user.title: Set up Tank Volume Calculator
user.description: Configure the tank volume calculator to convert fill height to volumetric percentage.

data_description.temperature_entity: Optional temperature sensor in F or C. If omitted, the reference temperature of 60 F (15.6 C) is used.
data_description.adjustment_coefficient: Per-degree expansion coefficient used for temperature compensation (default 0.0019).

details.title: Tank details
details.description: Provide the tank dimensions and volume.

data_description.tank_diameter: Presets fill default values you can adjust.
data_description.tank_total_length: Presets fill default values you can adjust.
data_description.tank_volume: Presets fill default values you can adjust.

error.invalid_diameter: Tank diameter must be greater than zero
error.invalid_length: Tank length must be greater than zero
error.invalid_volume: Tank volume must be greater than zero

data_description.temperature_entity: Optional temperature sensor in F or C. If omitted, the reference temperature of 60 F (15.6 C) is used.
data_description.adjustment_coefficient: Per-degree expansion coefficient used for temperature compensation (default 0.0022).
data_description.temperature_lag_hours: The propane's bulk temperature lags the (externally mounted) sensor by several hours because of thermal mass; compensating against a delayed temperature flattens the daily swing. This is the lag at 60°F. Set 0 (with slope 0) for the instantaneous reading.
data_description.temperature_lag_per_degree: How much the lag grows per °F of seasonal temperature above 60°F (~2-3 h cold, ~6-7 h warm). Default 0.067; set 0 for a constant lag.
data_description.temperature_smoothing_hours: Averaging window applied around the delayed temperature to reduce sensor noise (default 1 h).

details.title: Tank details
details.description: Update the tank dimensions and volume.

data_description.tank_diameter: Presets fill default values you can adjust.
data_description.tank_total_length: Presets fill default values you can adjust.
data_description.tank_volume: Presets fill default values you can adjust.

error.invalid_diameter: Tank diameter must be greater than zero
error.invalid_length: Tank length must be greater than zero
error.invalid_volume: Tank volume must be greater than zero
